heading: uaxUrlEmail
body:
The `uaxUrlEmail` tokenizer tokenizes URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s and email addresses.
Although `uaxUrlEmail` tokenizer tokenizes based on word break rules
from the [Unicode Text Segmentation
algorithm](http://www.unicode.org/L2/L2019/19034-uax29-34-draft.pdf),
we recommend using `uaxUrlEmail` tokenizer only when the indexed
field value includes URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s and email
addresses. For fields that don't include URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s or email addresses, use
the [standard](standard-tokenizer-ref) tokenizer to create tokens based on
word break rules.
